title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 3.15.2022
summary:
Main
Coal is driving the dry bulk market, but for how much longer? - Trade flows have clearly shifted in the coal market, and that is helping
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2022-03-15_breakwave-dry-bulk-shipping-report-3-15-2022_breakwavemarch152022report_cbec8e66b7d5.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2022-03-15_breakwave-dry-bulk-shipping-report-3-15-2022_breakwavemarch152022report_cbec8e66b7d5.pdf

[Page 1]
BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
March 15, 2022
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 2,775 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 2,727 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 28.6% ↑ 30D: 37.4% Momentum: Positive
↑ YTD: 43.5% ↑ YTD: 23.0% Sentiment: Positive
↑ YOY: 51.9% ↑ YOY: 39.1% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• Coal is driving the dry bulk market, but for how much longer? - Trade flows have clearly shifted in the coal market,
and that is helping dry bulk rates overcome the seasonal weakness that would otherwise have subdued freight rates
this time of the year.
